name: HawkinsOperations
purpose: Machine-readable reviewer navigation for the public website.

website_does_not_prove: citation, ranking, or validation by any AI or search provider
truth_boundary.authority: Evidence and human review authorize claims. AI can support labor only.

reviewer_routes.label: Truth surfaces
reviewer_routes.use: Review the separation between source, validation, runtime, signal, evidence, and public proof surfaces.

reviewer_routes.label: Repository authority map

reviewer_routes.label: Agent skills index
